## The Hackathon King

Rene Turcios is the undisputed hackathon king of San Francisco, and his story is quite remarkable. Since 2023, Turcios, 29, has attended more than 200 events, where he's won cash, software credits, and clout.

## The "Vibe Coder" Persona

What makes Turcios particularly notable is his unique approach to hackathons. He doesn't even know how to code. Instead, "Rene is the original vibe coder," said RJ Moscardon, a friend and fellow hacker who watched Turcios win second place at his first-ever hackathon at the AGI House mansion in Hillsborough.

At his first hackathon he prompted ChatGPT using plain English to generate a program that can convert any song into a lo-fi version.

## Background and Current Work

Turcios has built a reputation as a cannabis-loving former professional Yu-Gi-Oh! player who resells Labuubs out of his Tenderloin apartment when he's not busy attending nearly every hackathon happening in the city.

Turcios is now known for being able to build anything quickly. Businesses reach out to him to contract out projects that would take software engineering teams weeks — and he delivers in hours. He is the founder of Agentcies.co, his own AI agents startup.

3. **细节记忆偏差**：你看到的可能是两个内容的混合印象（比如黑客松冠军是一篇，"高维生物"人格设定是另一篇）
4. **内容已删除**：原帖可能已经被删掉

### 建议你自己排查
